title: ABOUT ME
description: Step into my world of curiosity and exploration. Discover my journey as an AI Engineer, and unravel the layers of my educational pursuits, leadership experiences, and innovative projects!

title: LEARN
description: Curious about Data Science and Machine Learning? Tune in to Data Ki Science for engaging insights and tutorials. Learn Data Science concepts like Machine Learning, Python Programming, and a lot more. Lets explore together!

title: MY PROJECTS
description: Discover a fusion of creativity and innovation in my project showcase. From AI & Deep Learning models to LLM RAG pipelines and Full Stack architectures. Lets journey through the realm of tech and possibilities!
